# Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup

> Complete setup guide for OpenSIN-AI development environment — macOS, OCI VM, OpenCode Stack, A2A Agents

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/README.md) - Quick start, features, architecture
- [macOS Setup Guide](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/macOS-dev-setup.md) - Local development on Mac (Homebrew, Git, Bun, Python, Docker, VS Code, iTerm2)
- [OCI Setup Guide](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/OCI-dev-setup.md) - Oracle Cloud A1.Flex VM setup (Frankfurt, 4 OCPUs, 24 GB RAM)
- [OpenCode CLI Setup](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/opencode-dev-setup.md) - OpenCode CLI installation
- [Docker Setup](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/opencode-docker-build/) - Docker development
- [Box Storage Guide](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/box-storage.md) - Box.com integration for logs/screenshots
- [oh-my-sin.json Guide](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/oh-my-sin-json.md) - Zentrales A2A Team Register (17 Teams, 40+ Agents)
- [Contributing](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to contribute
- [Security Policy](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/SECURITY.md) - Security policy
- [Changelog](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) - Version history

## Key Information

- License: MIT
- Languages: Bash, Python, YAML, Markdown, JavaScript/TypeScript
- Platforms: macOS, Oracle Cloud (OCI), Docker, HF Spaces
- Tech Stack: Homebrew, Git, Node.js 22 LTS, Bun 1.2+, Python 3.13, Docker Desktop, VS Code, iTerm2, OpenCode CLI
- Cloud Region: Frankfurt eu-frankfurt-1 (OCI) with 3 Availability Domains
- Cloud VM: Always-Free A1.Flex (4 OCPUs, 24 GB RAM) — or PAYGO workaround
- Storage: Box.com (10 GB free) via A2A-SIN-Box-Storage
- Automation: n8n + A2A-SIN-GitHub-Action on OCI VM (NO GitHub Actions!)
- Repo: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/Infra-SIN-Dev-Setup

## What This Project Does

This is the **central setup documentation system** for OpenSIN-AI developers. It provides step-by-step guides for:

1. **macOS Development Environment** — Homebrew, Git, Node.js (Bun, NOT npm!), Python 3.13, Docker Desktop, VS Code, iTerm2, SSH keys, Raycast
2. **Oracle Cloud Infrastructure VM** — Free A1.Flex cloud VM in Frankfurt with Ubuntu, n8n, A2A-SIN-GitHub-Action, Box.com Storage
3. **OpenCode Stack** — Global Brain (DPMA v4), PCPM hooks, 29+ Skills, 5 Plugins, 21 A2A Agents, 11 CLI Tools
4. **A2A Team Fleet** — 17 Teams (Coding, Worker, Infrastructure, Google Apps, Apple Apps, Social, Messaging, etc.) via oh-my-sin.json
5. **sin-sync** — Config sync Mac → OCI VM → HF VMs for identical environments

## Architecture

- **Local Mac** → OpenCode CLI + Homebrew Stack + Git + SSH
- **OCI VM** → n8n (Port 5678) + A2A-SIN-Box-Storage (Port 3000) + A2A-SIN-GitHub-Action + sin-supabase (200 GB)
- **A2A Fleet** → SIN-Zeus (Fleet Commander) → SIN-Simone-MCP, A2A-SIN-Frontend, A2A-SIN-Backend
- **Remote VMs** → HF Spaces, Lightning AI
- **Automation** → n8n + A2A-SIN-GitHub-Action (NO GitHub Actions!)
- **Storage** → Box.com via A2A-SIN-Box-Storage for logs, screenshots, backups

## Quick Start Commands

```bash
# 1. Xcode Tools
xcode-select --install

# 2. Homebrew
/bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Homebrew/install/HEAD/install.sh)"

# 3. Dev Stack
brew install git node bun python gh docker

# 4. Clone upgraded-opencode-stack
gh repo clone Delqhi/upgraded-opencode-stack ~/dev/upgraded-opencode-stack
cd ~/dev/upgraded-opencode-stack && ./install.sh

# 5. Initialize Global Brain (MANDATORY!)
node ~/.config/opencode/skills/global-brain/src/cli.js setup-hooks \
  --project $(basename "$PWD") --project-root "$PWD" --agents-directive

# 6. Sync to OCI VM (after OCI setup)
sin-sync
```

## Features

| Capability | Description | Status |
|:---|:---|:---:|
| Oracle Cloud A1.Flex | 4 OCPUs, 24 GB RAM, Always-Free | ✅ |
| n8n Workflow Engine | Workflow Automation on OCI VM | ✅ |
| A2A-SIN-GitHub-Action | CI/CD-like Automation (NO GitHub Actions!) | ✅ |
| Box.com Storage | Unlimited Cloud Storage for logs/screenshots | ✅ |
| OpenCode CLI | 29+ Skills, 5 Plugins, 21 Agents | ✅ |
| sin-sync | Config-Sync Mac → OCI VM → HF VMs | ✅ |
| Zentrales A2A Team Register | 17 Teams in oh-my-sin.json | ✅ |
| Budget Alerts | OCI Cost Monitoring (MANDATORY!) | ✅ |

- [oh-my-sin.json](https://github.com/Delqhi/upgraded-opencode-stack/blob/main/oh-my-sin.json) — Zentrales A2A Team Register (17 Teams)
- [OpenSIN-onboarding](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-onboarding) — End-User Onboarding

- [OpenSIN-AI](https://opensin.ai) — OpenSIN-AI Ecosystem

## A2A Teams (via oh-my-sin.json)

| Team | Purpose | Manager |
|:---|:---|:---|
| team-code | Elite Coder Fleet (Implementation, Testing, Deployment) | A2A-SIN-Zeus |
| team-worker | Autonomous Workers (Surveys, Freelancing, Monetization) | A2A-SIN-Team-Worker |
| team-infrastructure | DevOps Fleet (Deployment, CI/CD, Monitoring) | A2A-SIN-Team-Infrastructure |
| team-google-apps | Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail) | A2A-SIN-Google-Apps |
| team-apple | macOS/iOS Automation (Mail, Notes, Calendar, FaceTime, Safari) | A2A-SIN-Apple |
| team-social | Social Media (TikTok, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, YouTube) | A2A-SIN-Social |
| team-messaging | Messaging (WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, Discord, iMessage) | A2A-SIN-Messaging |
| team-forum | Forum Automation (Reddit, HackerNews, StackOverflow) | A2A-SIN-Forum |
| team-legal | Legal Automation (Patents, Tax, Claims) | A2A-SIN-Legal |
| team-coding-cybersec | Security Specialists (BugBounty, Cloudflare) | A2A-SIN-Code-CyberSec |
